{{Infobox character
| name = Loreli the Strategist
| introduced = Of Kings and Killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Loreli the Strategist]] is associated with a quote about not using anything as bait that you do not want eaten.}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
